# Martenweave

Martenweave is an open-source lightweight model registry for migration, MDM, data governance, and AMS/support teams.

It turns scattered model knowledge from Excel mappings, datasets, tickets, validation reports, decisions, and SAP context into structured, validated, searchable, traceable model context.

Current core: `martenweave-core` version `0.4.1`, MIT-licensed, installable from PyPI.

Official links:

- Website: https://martenweave.github.io/
- Docs: https://martenweave.github.io/docs.html
- FAQ: https://martenweave.github.io/docs/faq.html
- Core GitHub: https://github.com/metalhatscats/martenweave-core
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/martenweave-core/
- Full AI context: https://martenweave.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Machine-readable metadata: https://martenweave.github.io/ai.json

Primary audiences: SAP migration leads, MDM leads, data governance teams, data quality teams, AMS/support teams, enterprise architects, data stewards, and technical evaluators.

Current capabilities: canonical Markdown/YAML model files, deterministic validation, SQLite/JSONL generated indexes, search/query, trace/impact analysis, dataset profiling and gap detection, health and scorecard reports, CSV/XLSX review import/export flows, AI PatchProposal workflow, and human approval gates.

What Martenweave is not: not a chatbot, not a SaaS tenant platform, not a full enterprise MDM replacement, not a workflow engine, not a generic data catalog, not certified by SAP, and not affiliated with SAP.

AI safety stance: AI proposes. Validators verify. Humans approve. AI must not silently mutate canonical model files.

Open-source and commercial note: Martenweave Core is MIT-licensed open source. Commercial offerings may include implementation support, private domain packs, enterprise validation packs, hosted workbench work, custom integrations, and support SLAs under separate terms.

Public docs:

- Product: https://martenweave.github.io/docs/product.html
